items.summary:
Can you navigate gacha?
If you can, this is the hidden gem of the gacha world right now: HP Lovecraft meets Slay the Spire.

You will die.

items.title: [正面] For the first week or so I played on and off but t...
items.summary: For the first week or so I played on and off but the more I played the more I started to really like this game. Gacha aside, it is literally just a good, well-built game with interesting story and lore. But even taking into account the gacha, it is less of "will I get this character?", and more of "how many of this character do I want?". Overall, love the gameplay loop for this game as it is not only incredibly rewarding, but also super challenging which makes it all the better when you finally do get through it. It may not be for everyone, but I insist that people should at least give this game a chance.

items.title: [负面] Красивый визуал, интересный сеттинг... на этом все...
items.summary:
Красивый визуал, интересный сеттинг... на этом все. 

Локализации на основе ИИ - полный трешак, был бы хоть английский войс нормальный, можно было бы играть и с такими субами. 

Боевка скучная, и безумно, ПРОСТО БЕЗУМНО, затянутая и медленная.
